# Community Whitelist - IP Addresses
# Submitted by community members via GitHub Issues
# Format: One IPv4, IPv6, or CIDR per line
# Managed exclusively by GitHub Actions - DO NOT edit manually on server
#
# To submit a whitelist request, open an Issue:
# https://github.com/spydisec/spydithreatintel/issues/new/choose
208.67.222.222 # Issue #4: DNS Resolver (by @spydisec)
130.0.200.121 # Issue #5: Other (explain below) (by @DayZAnder)
